label: 476_mnuchin_secretary mnuchins_mnuchins_spokesperson secretary
description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin met with international counterparts including the Qatari Minister of State for Energy Affairs and European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde, discussing economic and financial matters at various high-level gatherings.

earliest_articles.title: Statement of Secretary Lew at a Bilateral Meeting with Saudi Finance Minister Ibrahim Abdulaziz Al Assaf
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) JEDDAH- Many thanks to Finance Minister Ibrahim Abdulaziz Al Assaf for meeting today. We have met several times in the last two years in Washington and around the world, and I am very appreciative of the opportunity to continue our dialogue here in Saudi Arabia. earliest_articles.title: Readout from a Treasury Spokesperson of Secretary Lew’s Meeting with Brazil Finance Minister Joaquim Levy at the IMF-World Bank Annual Meetings in Lima
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) LIMA – U.S. Treasury Secretary Jacob J. Lew met today with Brazil Finance Minister Joaquim Levy on the sidelines of the Annual Meetings of the International Monetary Fund (IMF) and the World Bank Group. Secretary Lew and Minister Levy exchanged views on the global economic outlook and recent…

newest_articles.title: READOUT: Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent’s Meeting with Minister of Finance Ali bin Ahmed Al Kuwari of Qatar
newest_articles.excerpt: WASHINGTON – On Friday, Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent met with Minister of Finance Ali bin Ahmed Al Kuwari of Qatar. Secretary Bessent and Minister Al Kuwari discussed Iran’s attacks against Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) countries and their regional and global economic impacts. Secretary Bessent noted the…

newest_articles.title: READOUT: Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent’s Meeting with Her Majesty Queen Maxima of the Netherlands and Minister of Finance Eelco Heinen of the Kingdom of the Netherlands
newest_articles.excerpt: WASHINGTON – On Friday, Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent met with Her Majesty Queen Máxima and Minister of Finance Eelco Heinen of the Kingdom of the Netherlands. Secretary Bessent thanked Queen Máxima and Minister Heinen for their support of the United States’ G20 priorities and their leadership on financial…

newest_articles.title: READOUT: Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent’s Meeting with Minister of Finance and National Economy Shaikh Salman bin Khalifa Al-Khalifa of Bahrain
newest_articles.excerpt: WASHINGTON – On Friday, Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent met with Bahrain Minister of Finance and National Economy Shaikh Salman bin Khalifa Al-Khalifa. Secretary Bessent and Minister Al-Khalifa discussed the strong U.S.-Bahrain partnership, with Minister Al-Khalifa thanking the United States for its staunch…
